data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of conversion linkage to orders and rewards, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or data that confirm this linkage. The prior steps focus on booking activities and financial outputs, but there is no mention of how conversions are linked to orders and rewards, indicating a clear gap in the implementation. This lack of evidence directly leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of conversion linkage to orders and rewards.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
